blocks.text:
Please select a cable below for more information, or 'Summary' for an overview.
 Please note we do not advise Meta Quest Link.
There are many cables available for the Quest, as it only requires a USB 3.0 connection to work. In the dropdown below, you can see details on multiple cables, including photos.

blocks.name: KIWI Design Link Cable
blocks.value: The Kiwi Design Link Cable is a USB A to C cable that is 5 or 6 meters long, depending on which one you purchase.

blocks.name: Kuject Link Cable with Charging
blocks.value: USB 3.0 cable with dedicated 9V 2A charging port. Smart chip maintains battery around 78%.

blocks.name: INIU Link Cable
blocks.value: INIU's USB A cable can accept external power, allowing unlimited playtime regardless of your USB port's output.

blocks.name: Meta Official Link Cable
blocks.value: The official cable is a USB C to C fiber optic cable that makes it lightweight, but fairly expensive.

blocks.name: Syntech Fast Charging Link Cable
blocks.value: 2-in-1 link cable with dedicated charging port. ~2.0-2.5 Gbps data rates. Includes velcro straps and LED indicator.

blocks.text: The Kiwi Design Link Cable is a copper standard cable made by a reputable company. Supports USB 3.2 Gen1 (5Gbps) with 18W charging.

blocks.name: Info
blocks.value:
__USB A or C (PC End)__: A 
 __90 Degree Angle__: Yes 
 __Length__: 5M/6M 
 __Speed__: USB 3.2 Gen1 (5Gbps) 
 __Charging__: 18W

blocks.text: USB 3.0 cable with dedicated 9V 2A charging port. Smart chip regulates current and maintains battery around 78%. Supports up to 5Gbps (verified ~3Gbps on Quest).

blocks.name: Info
blocks.value:
__USB A or C (PC End)__: A 
 __90 Degree Angle__: Yes 
 __Length__: 16FT (5M) 
 __Speed__: USB 3.0 (5Gbps) 
 __Charging__: 9V 2A (dedicated port)

blocks.text: The INIU Link cable can support external power, allowing unlimited playtime regardless of your USB port's output.

blocks.name: Info
blocks.value:
__USB A or C (PC End)__: A 
 __90 Degree Angle__: Yes 
 Length: 5M

blocks.text: The official cable is known to be a reliable good option as it's a lightweight thin fiber optic cable, but it is much more expensive than other options.

blocks.name: Info
blocks.value:
__USB A or C (PC End)__: C 
 __90 Degree Angle__: Yes 
 Length: 5M

blocks.text: 2-in-1 link cable with dedicated charging port. ~2.0-2.5 Gbps data rates. Includes velcro straps and LED indicator.
